ksa_text: Manage test data for AI systems, including test data generation, validation, sensitivity analysis of test cases, and protection of sensitive test data.

dcwf.top_element_label: Perform risk assessment whenever an AI application or AI-enabled system undergoes a major change, when emergent behaviors are detected, and/or unintended consequences are reported.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI systems are evaluated for trustworthy characteristics.

top_anchors.element_label: AI systems are evaluated for trustworthy characteristics.
Perform risk assessment whenever an AI application or AI-enabled system undergoes a major change, when emergent behaviors are detected, and/or unintended consequences are reported.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-T-005 (RM, Task) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4973 is insufficient to establish relevance to clinical data management, regulatory compliance, and healthcare analytics at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nist_ai_rmf=0.497, eu_ai_act=0.469, nice=0.409) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4973 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does RM-domain KSA RM-T-005 (composite 0.4973) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: RM domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per COSO ERM framework; risk competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data risk identification, not enterprise risk management. Composite 0.4973 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms RM domain KSA at composite 0.4973 is not a standard requirement for Clinical Data Manager at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4973, domain RM, scope weak fit. High confidence.
